import axios from'axios';const API_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:3001/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_URL});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token)config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);return config;});// Auth
export const register=data=>api.post('/auth/register',data);export const login=data=>api.post('/auth/login',data);export const forgotPassword=email=>api.post('/auth/forgot-password',{email});export const resetPassword=(token,password)=>api.post('/auth/reset-password',{token,password});export const checkResetToken=token=>api.get("/auth/reset-password/".concat(token));// Projects
export const getProjects=()=>api.get('/projects');export const getProject=id=>api.get("/projects/".concat(id));export const createProject=data=>api.post('/projects',data);export const updateProject=(id,data)=>api.patch("/projects/".concat(id),data);export const deleteProject=id=>api.delete("/projects/".concat(id));export const reorderProjects=projectIds=>api.post('/projects/reorder',{projectIds});export const inviteToProject=(projectId,email)=>api.post("/projects/".concat(projectId,"/invite"),{email});export const respondToInvitation=(projectId,action)=>api.patch("/projects/".concat(projectId,"/invitation/").concat(action));export const getPendingInvitations=()=>api.get('/projects/invitations/pending');// Tasks
export const createTask=data=>api.post('/tasks',data);export const updateTask=(id,data)=>api.patch("/tasks/".concat(id),data);export const deleteTask=id=>api.delete("/tasks/".concat(id));export const getMyTasks=()=>api.get('/tasks/my');// Reports
export const getReportByToken=token=>api.get("/tasks/report-token/".concat(token));export const submitReportByToken=(token,reportText)=>api.post("/tasks/report-token/".concat(token),{reportText});export const getTaskReports=taskId=>api.get("/tasks/".concat(taskId,"/reports"));// Files
export const uploadFile=(taskId,file)=>{const formData=new FormData();formData.append('file',file);return api.post("/tasks/".concat(taskId,"/attachments"),formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});};export const getTaskAttachments=taskId=>api.get("/tasks/".concat(taskId,"/attachments"));export const downloadFile=(taskId,fileId)=>api.get("/tasks/".concat(taskId,"/attachments/").concat(fileId,"/download"),{responseType:'blob'});export const deleteFile=(taskId,fileId)=>api.delete("/tasks/".concat(taskId,"/attachments/").concat(fileId));// Team
export const getTeam=()=>api.get('/team');export const addTeamMember=email=>api.post('/team',{email});export const removeTeamMember=memberId=>api.delete("/team/".concat(memberId));export const getTeamInvitations=()=>api.get('/team/invitations');export const respondToTeamInvitation=(ownerId,action)=>api.patch("/team/invitations/".concat(ownerId,"/").concat(action));// Email verification
export const verifyEmail=token=>api.get("/auth/verify-email/".concat(token));export const resendVerification=email=>api.post('/auth/resend-verification',{email});export default api;
